F_N12_1.title: Cross-substrate OR signature consistency
F_N12_1.primary_verdict_reason_at_sc_100us: ratio 7.82 outside [0.67, 1.5] -> OR signature substrate-specific -> Orch-OR weakened
F_N12_1.honest_c3: Verdict highly sensitive to SC reference choice. Agent did not extract PRNewswire 2025-03 SC paper exact tau_2 — used 100us as canonical IBM Heron 4-qubit GHZ T2* bracket. Sensitivity sweep documents that for SC tau_2 in [600, 1200]us the test would be INDETERMINATE; for SC tau_2 < 600us or > 1200us the test FAILs. Single-delay budget (100us only at C1) limits confidence — sigma_tau ~ tau itself.

F_N12_2.title: Decoherence-only null model (1/N depolarizing scaling)
F_N12_2.interpretation: C1 4-qubit tau_2 LARGER than 4x-scaling predicts -- either (a) rx(2*pi) surrogate doesn't actually decohere on Forte 1, (b) GHZ has correlated-noise protection on trapped-ion, or (c) standard depolarizing model wrong. Most likely (a) -- rx(2*pi) is virtually a frame change, not real decoherence-inducing wait. Honest C3: this contaminates F-N12-1 too.

F_N12_3.title: DP mass-scaling escape window
F_N12_3.interpretation: Observed tau_2 ratio (~10) is 100x to 1e6x SMALLER than DP mass-scaling predicts. DP point variant in this simplified form is rejected -- but SC effective-mass definition is itself ambiguous (Cooper-pair count, junction capacitance), so 'FAIL' here is weak evidence.

F_N12_4.title: Lindblad vs OR-augmented AIC
F_N12_4.reason: Single delay point (100us) + 100 shots insufficient for AIC discrimination between thermal-only and OR-augmented models. Need >=3 delay points or full state tomography (16 amplitudes for 4-qubit) -- both exceed MVP budget.

C3_sanity.interpretation: Forte 1 hardware operational; Bell pair P(00 or 11) = 99/100 = 99% (>= 95% threshold). The ONE wrong outcome (10) is consistent with single-shot SPAM error (~1%).

overall_orch_or_evidence_state.secondary_F_N12_2: FAIL (likely surrogate-circuit artifact, not real anomaly)
overall_orch_or_evidence_state.secondary_F_N12_3: FAIL (weak; DP mass model itself ambiguous)
overall_orch_or_evidence_state.rationale: F-N12-1 PASS would emit graduation witness (axis N-12 advances). FAIL with major honest_c3 caveats (SC ref unverified; rx(2*pi) surrogate possibly not decohering) means we cannot confidently claim Orch-OR refutation -- only 'no cross-substrate signature visible at MVP scale with surrogate-delay circuit'. Recommended next step: re-run with verbatim-mode pulse-level delay (Forte 1 supports `verbatim` pragma), and extract actual PRNewswire SC reference numeric. Both deferred per separate authorization.
